issues.detail: Instructions do not cover error handling or edge cases.
Skill assumes Node.js 18+ and npm, limiting cross-platform compatibility.

scenarios.name: api-best-practices-talk
scenarios.rationale: Response B better meets the rubric by including the required frontmatter and theme, whereas Response A lacks these and also misses several other key elements.

scenarios.name: docker-outline-slides
scenarios.rationale: Response A covers most rubric items with code blocks, a Mermaid diagram, and a best‑practice checklist, but misses the default theme and build command; Response B lacks the diagram, checklist slide, theme, and build command.
